codeReview.summary: The Recovery view composition is largely present (insight card, sparklines, baseline bands, table, and states), but one required behavior is missing: a selectable 3–7 day range. The implementation hard-codes a 5-day window, so users cannot choose range length as specified.

issues.description: The date range is fixed to 5 days (`subDays(endDate, 4)`) and there is no range selector control, but the feature description requires DateNavigation with a selectable 3–7 day recovery range.

Trigger marker rendering is gated only on `recoveryData.annotations.length > 0`, while the API returns a dedicated `triggering_event` field. The component does not consume `triggering_event`, so marker behavior can diverge from API intent when triggering event data is present but not part of the merged annotations list.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill context, and commit e56debf diff. Failing this feature due to missing required 3–7 day range selector behavior; also noted a non-blocking mismatch between `triggering_event` response data and marker rendering logic.
